name: Theorealize Past Lull
notes: Please note that the text of this card has been adjusted. Be sure and play with the version on this page, even if your physical card is different.
effectText: If you control an "Artmage", "DoomZ", or "Elfnote" card: You can Special Summon 1 "Medius the Pure" from your hand or Deck. Your opponent cannot activate cards or effects when that monster is Special Summoned. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Fusion, Synchro, or Xyz Monster in your GY; Special Summon it to your zone a Link Monster points to. You can only use 1 "Theorealize Past Lull" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
